title: Leo September 2026 Horoscope and Crystal of the Month
excerpt: Leo September 2026 horoscope: New Moon in Virgo (Sep 11, 2nd house) + Aries Harvest Full Moon (Sep 26, 9th house). The month resets money and widens the view. Crystal: Tiger's Eye.
rank_math_title: Leo September 2026 Horoscope: Key Dates, Love, Career & Crystal of the Month
rank_math_description: Leo September 2026 monthly horoscope — key dates, love, career, health and Crystal of the Month (Tiger's Eye). New Moon Sep 11 in Virgo (money); Aries Harvest Full Moon Sep 26 (belief).
content:
Leo September 2026 Horoscope and Crystal of the Month

Energy ThemeReset the worth, widen the view
Key DatesNew Moon Sep 11 (Virgo, 2nd house) / Sun into Libra Sep 22 / Aries Harvest Full Moon Sep 26 (9th house)
Love2nd house New Moon reshapes self-worth; the 9th house Full Moon widens the love story
CareerIncome and worth pivot early; teaching and travel call late
Crystal of the MonthTiger's Eye
Lucky ColorsHoney gold, warm amber, sunset orange
Lucky Number2
AffirmationI let the worth settle; I let the horizon widen.

This Month's Energy

Leo, September 2026 resets the worth and widens the view. The New Moon in Virgo on September 11 falls in your 2nd house of income, self-worth, and material resources — a fresh start in how you earn, how you value yourself, what you own, and what you owe. Then September 26 brings the Harvest Full Moon in Aries, falling in your 9th house of belief, travel, teaching, and the wider view — a climax around a long-held story you tell about your life. September's pattern is: settle the worth early, then widen the horizon late.

Key Dates for Leo in September 2026

DateTransitMeaning for LeoDo / Avoid
Sep 11New Moon in Virgo2nd house — fresh start in income, self-worth, possessions, money direction; commit to the new rate or worthDo: set the new rate, sign the income contract, name what your work is worth
Avoid: financial decisions made from insecurity
Sep 22Sun enters Libra (equinox)3rd house season — communication, siblings, neighborhood, short-form writing through late OctoberDo: write the piece, mend the sibling tie, refine the message
Avoid: hiding the new self in old language
Sep 26Harvest Full Moon in Aries9th house — belief, travel, teaching, publishing, the wider view climax; a long-held story reaches a turning pointDo: publish the work, book the trip, teach the class, name the bigger story
Avoid: staying small when the wider view is calling
Sep 9Venus enters Scorpio (your 4th)Warmth toward home, family, and inner foundation through OctoberDo: beautify the home, mend the family tie, soften the foundation
Avoid: neglecting the body that carries the worth
Sep 26–OctMars enters Capricorn6th house — work, routine, health become action zones through NovemberDo: organize systems, schedule health check-ins, fix the routine
Avoid: overworking while the wider view opens
Sep 4Mercury enters Virgo (your 2nd)Income and worth conversations sharpen; the new rate finds its wordsDo: set the rate, sign the contract, organize money
Avoid: undervaluing the new self

Career & Money

For Leo, September's career story opens with money. The Virgo New Moon on September 11 falls in your 2nd house of income and self-worth — a fresh start in your rate, your income direction, your contracts, or a worth threshold. After the August eclipse in your sign reset who you are, September asks: what is the new self worth?

The Aries Harvest Full Moon on September 26 falls in your 9th house of teaching, publishing, travel, and the wider view — a climax around a long-held story you tell about your life's meaning. Combined with Mercury entering Virgo (your 2nd house) on September 4 and Mars entering Capricorn (your 6th house of work) around September 26, the second half strongly favors organizing the daily work that supports the wider view. Crystals for wealth can support the work; the practical move is settle the rate early, then ship the wider view late.

Love & Relationships

The Virgo New Moon on September 11 falls in your 2nd house of self-worth. For Leo, this is the love signature of the month: self-worth is the foundation of partnership. A worth reset (in money, in rate, in what you accept) ripples into every relationship. The August eclipse in your sign already opened the reinvention; September now values it.

The Aries Harvest Full Moon on September 26 falls in your 9th house of belief and the wider view — a relationship story may expand (long-distance, teaching together, a shared worldview). Venus entering Scorpio (your 4th house of home and family) on September 9 softens the foundation through October. Crystals for love can support the work; the deeper practice is letting the worth settle so the partnership can root deeper.

Health & Wellness

September's wellness story has two halves. The Virgo New Moon on September 11 (your 2nd house) emphasizes body-and-worth alignment — what you eat, what you earn, and how you value yourself become one practice.

After Mars enters Capricorn (your 6th house of routine) around September 26, the medicine is steady daily routine. Tiger's Eye, your crystal of the month, is traditionally associated with grounding, focus, balanced courage, and protection — a useful symbolic companion for a fire sign working with worth and belief. Sun-ruled Leo carries tension in the heart and upper back; gentle heart-opening, cardio, and rest are especially helpful. This is lifestyle guidance, not medical advice; persistent concerns belong with a clinician.

Crystal of the Month: Tiger's Eye

Why Tiger's Eye fits Leo this month. You are Sun-ruled and September asks you to do Leo's deeper work: settle the worth (2nd house) before widening the view (9th house). Tiger's Eye — traditionally tied to grounding, focus, protection, and balanced courage — is the stone that anchors Leo's fire in earthy follow-through. Where Sunstone would radiate and Carnelian would heat, Tiger's Eye holds: warm, dense, perfectly matched to a fire sign doing earthy worth-work. The 2nd house reset meets a stone that grounds it.

How to use it during September 2026. Place Tiger's Eye near where you do money work (wallet, desk, banking app) on September 11 (the Virgo New Moon). Carry it during any belief-or-travel conversation in the days around September 26 (the 9th house Full Moon).

Best date to use it: September 11, the Virgo New Moon in your 2nd house — hold Tiger's Eye at your solar plexus for 5 minutes before any money or worth conversation, naming the new rate.

Read more: Tiger's Eye Meaning and Best Crystals for Leo.

Monthly Crystal Ritual for Leo — September 2026

When: September 11, the Virgo New Moon in your 2nd house.
Crystal: Tiger's Eye.
Intention: Let the new worth settle; let the income story reset itself.

  1. Cleanse Tiger's Eye under cool running water for 30 seconds on the morning of September 11.
  2. Set the intention on the 2nd house theme: write down one number — the rate, the price, the savings goal — that reflects what the new self (after the August eclipse) is now worth.
  3. Act in the days following: communicate the rate, sign the contract, open the new account. Tiger's Eye in your pocket during the act.
  4. Reflect at the Aries Harvest Full Moon on September 26: what wider story about your life is now possible because the worth has settled? Hold Tiger's Eye during the harvest.

Shop Leo Crystals for September 2026

Explore the full Leo crystal guide for stones connected with confidence, courage, focus, and self-worth — including the Tiger's Eye that anchors Leo's fire in earthy follow-through during a worth-and-worldview month. Every stone is genuine, ethically sourced, and real — not dyed, not glass.

Frequently Asked Questions — Leo September 2026

Is September 2026 a good month for Leo?

It's a worth-and-worldview month. The Virgo New Moon on September 11 (your 2nd house of income and self-worth) resets the rate. The Aries Harvest Full Moon on September 26 (your 9th house) widens the horizon.

How will the Virgo New Moon on September 11 affect Leo?

It falls in your 2nd house of income, self-worth, and material resources. After the August eclipse in your sign reset identity, September now values it. Set the new rate; sign the income contract.

What does the Aries Harvest Full Moon on September 26 mean for Leo?

It falls in your 9th house of belief, travel, teaching, and the wider view — a long-held story reaches a turning point. Publish, teach, travel, name the bigger story.

What is the best crystal for Leo in September 2026?

Tiger's Eye — it anchors Leo's fire in earthy follow-through, exactly what a 2nd house Virgo New Moon (worth) plus a 9th house Aries Full Moon (worldview) demand. See the full Leo crystal guide →

How does the August eclipse in Leo affect September 2026?

The August 12 solar eclipse in your sign began a once-in-years identity reset. September now values the new self (2nd house Virgo New Moon) and asks what wider story it makes possible (9th house Aries Full Moon).
